todos.content: Fix token logos: use getTokenLogoFallbacks in token selector, not just metadata.logoURI
Fix token ordering: tokens with balance show first in all dropdowns
Fix batch EVM: Alchemy returns addresses but balanceOf re-check is redundant - trust Alchemy results directly
Fix batch token display: show logo in batch token list
